title: Multi-turn context injection — buildUserContext prepended to LLM messages
evidence: Accepts { layout, timeRange?: { start, end }, filters: GlobalFilters }
Deduplicates component names, shows up to 8 then '+N more'
Context stays under 500 chars for 12-item layout (test verified)
Context injected as [Context: ...] prefix in AgentOrchestrator.handleSend()
Original message shown in UI; contextual message sent to LLM
